svg.title: Offshore Co. mark
svg.desc: The Offshore Co. monogram. An outer C with a 50-degree opening on the right side, containing an inner o ring at the center. Reads as the O of Offshore, the c of Co., the copyright glyph for a Co., a porthole, and a dive-watch bezel — four valid readings in one ownable shape. ViewBox is 512 by 512; center is at (256, 256). Outer C has radius 215.04 and stroke 58.88; inner o has radius 92.16 and stroke 48.64. Stroke uses currentColor so the mark inherits color from its parent.
